name: Marinated Pork Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the fat from the tenderloins. If thick, split lengthwise.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients except the oil in a bowl.
3. Marinate the pork in the mixture for three hours in the refrigerator, turning and basting frequently.
4. Drain and reserve the marinade.
5. Preheat oven to moderate 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
6. Transfer the pork to an oiled roasting pan and roast until tender, about forty-five minutes.
7. Simmer the marinade for ten minutes.
8. Cut the pork into thin slices and serve on cocktail picks with the marinade as an hors d'oeuvre.
